subject: Fix Critical & Major issues in adapters
commit_message:
Fix Critical & Major issues in adapters

The Cyclomatic Complexity of this method "createStackParam" is 16 which is greater than 10 authorized
Either log or rethrow this exception

Issue-ID: SO-1841
Change-Id: Ie5539a853a112ed751bbf891699f181479537e47
Signed-off-by: Parshad Patel <pars.patel@samsung.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.
